active_projects.description: Update /home/benjamin/.config/zed/README.md and the other documentation in /home/benjamin/.config/zed/docs/README.md and /home/benjamin/.config/zed/docs/ to reflect that this is a configuration for working in R and Python with Claude Code in the Zed IDE.
Simple test RCT study on fake generated data to verify R and Python are configured correctly in Zed and identify configuration shortcomings.

forcing_data.research_question: Does ketamine assisted therapy improve recovery from methamphetamine use disorder?
forcing_data.causal_structure: Treatment -> Recovery, confounded by baseline severity and demographics

artifacts.summary: Study design report for test RCT: ketamine-assisted therapy for methamphetamine use disorder with synthetic data generation plan and Zed configuration assessment
